description_long: A cluster of four large black garbage bags is shown, each made from shiny, crinkled plastic with visible highlights and creases. The bags are tightly sealed at the top with twisted knots, giving them a slightly irregular, bulging appearance. Their surfaces reflect ambient light, emphasizing the glossy, flexible nature of the plastic material. The bags are grouped closely together, with some leaning against each other, suggesting they are filled with mixed refuse. No printed labels, logos, or text are visible on the exterior. The bags rest directly on the ground, typical of urban street or alleyway settings.
description: Four large, glossy black garbage bags tightly knotted at the top, bulging and grouped together on the ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four garbage bags, with two bags more prominently in front and the other two partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two bags in the foreground, with the other two mostly obscured behind them.
description_view_2: Rear view with the two back bags more visible, showing the rounded, bulging shapes and knotted tops.
description_view_3: Angled view where all four bags are visible, with the knots and glossy surfaces clearly seen.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: bulging and moderately overfilled, with taut surfaces and rounded shapes
